name: Add fix-cycle constraint to domain
description: Adds a constraint requiring task splitting when fix cycles exceed threshold
edit_content: - **Fix-Cycle Guard**: If a domain historically exceeds 2 fix cycles per task, split tasks into smaller units (max 3 files changed per task) and require explicit acceptance criteria for each sub-task.

name: Add pre-condition review to domain
description: Adds a pre-condition review step for domains with low first-pass rates
edit_content: - **First-Pass Guard**: This domain has a low first-pass rate. Before dispatching each task, verify: (1) all referenced contracts are current, (2) task acceptance criteria are unambiguous, (3) no known blockers exist in deferred-items.md.
